hero.tagline: From Copán's fields to the European shelf
hero.headline: Your cup has things to tell you.
hero.subheadline: I'm Juan Welchez — agronomist, Q Grader and Honduran coffee farmer. I grew up among harvests in Copán Ruinas. Today from Hamburg I source specialty coffee for Europe and teach you what most people drink without ever knowing.

mission.title: Who's behind the cup
mission.text:
The Cupping Farmer is me: Juan Ángel Welchez. Agronomist from Zamorano, grandson of coffee farmers, and the Honduran who now sources micro-lots from over 60 origins for the European market.

I'm not here to sell you coffee. I'm here to explain what's inside it — because I've seen it from the seed up. From the family farm in Copán Ruinas to the cupping tables in Hamburg, coffee has always been the language I use to understand the world.
This is what I know. No filter.

values.title: Traceable origin
values.text: Every lot I select has a defined country, region and process. No empty labels. Traceability isn't marketing — it's the minimum of respect for the farmer who grew it and for you who drinks it.

values.title: Sensory authority
values.text: Certified Q Grader with over a decade of cupping in the field and at commercial tables. What I tell you about a cup, I can back up from the plant to the extraction.

values.title: Real community
values.text: I work directly with small producers from Honduras, Colombia and other origins. Buying here isn't just coffee — it's closing the circle of the supply chain.

featured.title: Our coffees
featured.subtitle: Micro-lot selection with unique flavor profiles

experiences_teaser.title: Coffee makes more sense when you taste it
experiences_teaser.subtitle: Beyond the cup
experiences_teaser.text: Guided cuppings, origin workshops and sensory experiences so you stop drinking coffee on autopilot and start drinking it for real. With me as your guide — not as a professor, but as the friend who's already walked the path and wants to show you what he found.

social.title: Unfiltered coffee, every day
social.subtitle: On Instagram and TikTok I share what your cup of coffee is hiding from you. Technique, origin, real discoveries — no corporate script.

about.title: Our story
about.subtitle: From Copán Ruinas to the world
about.story_title: The origin of The Cupping Farmer
about.story:
It all started in the coffee fields of Copán Ruinas, Honduras — one of the most authentic coffee-growing regions in Central America. I grew up among farms and harvests, learning that quality is born long before it reaches the cup.

The Cupping Farmer grew from that field experience combined with the rigor of professional cupping. Today, from Hamburg (Germany), I select origin micro-lots from Honduras, Colombia and other coffee-producing countries, with the eye of someone who knows coffee from the root up.

Each bag tells the story of a farm, a process and hands that care for the bean with dedication. That is what I share with you.
